workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_tiqora/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
YOU MUST ALWAYS SPEAK OUTPUT in the configured communication_language resolved from merged tiqora config.
Generate technical agent artifacts (challenge.md, implementation notes, validation) in ENGLISH for agent performance.
Generate all PM-facing content (Jira comments, MR Report) in {{document_language}}.
Commits are ALWAYS in ENGLISH (dev standard). This is non-negotiable.
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps.
Do not report "completed" until all implementation, validation, and PM sync activities are truly finished.

step.goal: Load and validate tiqora configuration (silent mode)
step.action: Load project config from {project_config} as required input.
HALT: "✗ No project .tiqora.yaml found. Run 'npx tiqora init' first."
Load profile config from {profile_config} when available (optional).
Build effective config as: profile config (base) + project config (override).

Apply defaults when missing: user_name={default_user_name}, idle_threshold_minutes={default_idle_threshold_minutes}, communication_language={default_communication_language}, document_language={default_document_language}.
Validate required project keys: pm_tool, git_host, branch_pattern.

action.if: any required project key is missing

step.action: HALT: "✗ Blocking configuration error in {project_config}: missing pm_tool, git_host, or branch_pattern. Edit .tiqora.yaml and add these keys."
Read {active_run_file} if present.

check.if: an active run exists and is not completed
check.ask: Do you want to resume this run or close it before starting another one? (resume/close)

check.action: Resume existing run and continue.
Mark previous run closed, then continue.

step.goal: Resolve ticket context and transition to In Progress
step.action: If a ticket ID is provided, retrieve the ticket via configured PM MCP connector before challenge/implementation.
If pm_tool is configured and no ticket provided, ask user to choose: work on existing ticket or create new ticket.

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

step.action: Capture PM tracking identifiers (ticket key/id, workspace/project identifiers, available transitions) needed for status, comments, and worklog operations.

check.ask: Ticket retrieval failed. Retry MCP fetch or continue in standalone mode? (retry/standalone)

check.action: Retry retrieval once and continue if successful.
Continue with explicit ambiguity warning and queue sync retry metadata in .tiqora/sync/queue.json.

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

step.action: IMMEDIATELY transition ticket to {pm_in_progress_status} via PM MCP connector with comment: "Starting analysis and implementation. Branch: {{branchName}}, Run ID: {{runId}}"

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

step.action: Capture timestamp as {{worklog_start_time}} for worklog calculation (includes challenge + implementation duration).

check.action: Log warning: "⚠ Could not transition ticket to In Progress. Queued in .tiqora/sync/queue.json for retry. Continuing with implementation."

step.output: [WORKFLOW] ✓ Ticket context resolved | Jira status: In Progress | Worklog tracking started

step.critical: No implementation starts before challenge is thoroughly passed. This is a critical gate.
step.action: Capture current active persona as {{entry_persona}}.
Load PM persona from {project-root}/_tiqora/agents/pm.md for this challenge gate.

Conduct rigorous PM-quality challenge on the ticket analyzing: 1. CLARITY: Is the user story or ticket description clear and unambiguous? 2. CONSISTENCY: Do acceptance criteria align with ticket intent? Any contradictions? 3. SCOPE: Is the scope bounded and realistic? Any hidden dependencies? 4. ALIGNMENT: Does this ticket make sense in the project context? Check against project goals/architecture if available. 5. TESTABILITY: Are acceptance criteria measurable and testable? Can QA/user verify completion? 6. RISKS: What could go wrong? What dependencies exist? What's the impact of this work?

Create challenge artifact at {workflow_steps_dir}/{{runId}}-challenge.md (ENGLISH) with these sections: - **Ticket Intent**: What problem does this solve? - **Acceptance Criteria** (checked): ✓ or ✗ for each AC - **PM Challenge Verdict**: PASS or FAIL with justification - **Scope Boundaries**: What's included, what's out-of-scope - **Implementation Approach**: High-level technical direction - **Risks & Blockers**: What could go wrong? Any known issues? - **Dependencies**: Other tickets, external systems, prerequisites - **Testability Notes**: How to verify implementation is complete

check.if: PM challenge identifies critical gaps or ambiguities
check.action: Restore persona to {{entry_persona}}.
Set run state to awaiting_user.
check.ask:
⚠️ Challenge gate FAILED. Issues found: [List the specific gaps/ambiguities]
Please clarify the ticket or update it in Jira before implementation can proceed. Waiting for your input.

check.if: ticket is clear and challenge passes

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

check.action: Post challenge summary comment on ticket in {{document_language}}: "✓ Challenge Gate PASSED - Scope: [1-2 sentences on what will be built] - Approach: [1-2 sentences on technical direction] - Key Risks: [bullet points if any] - Branch: {{branchName}} | Run: {{runId}}"
Restore persona to {{entry_persona}} before step 5+ implementation work.

step.goal: Create/switch git branch and persist run state
step.action: Resolve branch name from ticket ID + slug using branch_pattern from effective config.
Create or switch to target branch using git.
Ensure directories exist: {workflow_runs_dir} and {workflow_steps_dir}.

Persist active run state to {active_run_file} and run artifact to {workflow_runs_dir}/{{runId}}.json, including: - ticketId, branchName, runId - status: "in_progress" - timestamps: challenge_started_at, implementation_started_at, last_activity_at - worklog_start_time: {{worklog_start_time}} (for final worklog calculation) - pm_tool, git_host, document_language (for later reporting)
step.output: [WORKFLOW] ✓ Branch created: {{branchName}} | Run ID: {{runId}} | Worklog: tracking

step.goal: Implement scope with test-first discipline + mandatory commit
step.critical: Follow the approved challenge scope EXACTLY; do not implement out-of-scope features.
At the end of this step, you MUST make a git commit with conventional commit messages.
step.action: Load Developer persona from {project-root}/_tiqora/agents/dev.md for implementation and test execution.
Plan concrete implementation tasks from challenge + ticket context.
Write failing tests first when feasible (red), implement minimal code (green), then refactor safely (refactor).
Run targeted and regression tests.
Update run artifacts and notes under .tiqora as work progresses.

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

step.action: Publish at least one progress comment during implementation with done/next/blockers. Format: "✓ Done: [X] | Next: [Y] | Blockers: [Z]" and update last_activity_at in run state.

check.if: implementation is blocked and pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved
check.action: Transition ticket to {pm_blocked_status} via PM MCP (if available), otherwise add explicit blocker comment.

action.if: required dependency or architectural change exceeds scope

step.action: ASK user approval: "This change exceeds approved scope. Approve to proceed? (yes/no)"

After all implementation is complete: 1. Run all tests one final time (regression check). 2. Generate conventional commit messages based on changes: - Use "feat:" for new features (from ticket intent) - Use "fix:" for bug fixes - Use "refactor:" for code refactoring - Use "test:" for test-only changes - Add ticket ID in footer: "Fixes {{ticketId}}" 3. Stage all changes: git add . 4. Commit with message(s): "feat: [brief description from ticket] ({{ticketId}})
- Implementation detail 1 - Implementation detail 2 - Testing notes
Fixes {{ticketId}}"
Update run state: mark implementation_completed_at timestamp.

step.goal: Generate MR Report and request developer validation
step.critical: MR Report is mandatory and must be validated by the developer before pushing.
step.action: Analyze git diff from branch_base..HEAD to understand all changes made.

Generate MR Report at {workflow_runs_dir}/{{runId}}-mr-report.md in {{document_language}} with sections:
**Title**: [Brief summary of what was implemented]
**Description**: [1-2 paragraphs explaining the feature/fix and its purpose]
**Technical Choices**: - [Key architecture decision 1 and why] - [Key architecture decision 2 and why] - [Any libraries/tools introduced and justification]
**Changes Made**: - [File path 1]: [What was changed and why] - [File path 2]: [What was changed and why] [List all significant changes]
**Testing**: - Unit tests: [Where, what's tested] - Integration tests: [Where, what's tested] - Manual testing steps: [How to verify this works]
**How to Run**: 1. [Prerequisites/setup steps] 2. [Build/install command if needed] 3. [Running the feature/fix] 4. [Expected output/behavior]
**Deployment Notes**: - [Any database migrations? Yes/No] - [Any environment variables needed? List] - [Breaking changes? Yes/No, describe] - [Rollback plan if needed]
**Reviewed By**: [Developer name] **Reviewed At**: [Timestamp]
Display the generated MR Report to the developer and ask for validation.
step.ask:
MR Report generated. Please review and validate: [ ] Are technical choices explained clearly? [ ] Are testing instructions complete and accurate? [ ] Are deployment notes accurate?
Choose: (approve/edit/regenerate)

check.action: If edit: Display prompt for developer to provide modifications. Apply changes to the report file. If regenerate: Re-run the MR Report generation with developer guidance.

step.action: Once approved, mark run state: mr_report_approved_at = now.
Load and execute validation checklist from {validation}.
If checklist fails, return to implementation/validation until pass or HALT with explicit blockers.

step.goal: Move to Review, push MR, sync Jira and finalize worklog
step.critical: This is the final step. Ensure all syncs are complete before marking done.
step.action: Restore persona to {{entry_persona}} before final workflow status communication.

check.if: work is complete and validation passed and MR report approved

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

check.action: Compute time spent from {{worklog_start_time}} to now, rounding to {worklog_rounding_minutes} minutes with minimum {minimum_worklog_minutes} minutes. If timestamps unavailable, ask user: "How much time did you spend on this ticket (in minutes)?" Store as {{total_worklog_minutes}}.
Push branch to remote: git push -u origin {{branchName}}

Create MR/PR in {{git_host}}: - Title: "[{{ticketId}}] " + [MR Report title] - Description: [MR Report content from step 7] - Link to challenge artifact: {workflow_steps_dir}/{{runId}}-challenge.md - Link to implementation notes: available in branch
Capture MR/PR URL as {{mr_url}} for Jira comment.

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

check.action: Transition ticket to {pm_review_status} (or {pm_done_status} if no review stage) via PM MCP connector.

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

check.action:
Add final completion comment to ticket in {{document_language}}: "✓ IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE
Branch: {{branchName}} MR: {{mr_url}} Time spent: {{total_worklog_minutes}} minutes
Delivered: - All acceptance criteria met - Tests passing (unit + regression) - Code review ready
Next: Await code review"

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

check.action: Push worklog via PM MCP: {{total_worklog_minutes}} minutes
Log warning: "⚠ Final PM/MR sync failed. Queued in .tiqora/sync/queue.json for retry."
Queue retry metadata with MR URL, worklog, and status transition details.
Mark run state as completed and persist to {active_run_file} and {workflow_runs_dir}/{{runId}}.json.
Update run state: completed_at = now, status = "completed", final_mr_url = {{mr_url}}
Restore run state to in_progress.
check.output: [WORKFLOW] ✗ DoD validation failed. Return to implementation.

action.if: pm_tool is not none and ticket was retrieved

check.action: Add ticket comment: "Awaiting clarification on [topic]. Paused implementation."
Mark run state as awaiting_user and persist atomically.
